summary: Engineering change order split complex flop.
description: Engineering change order split complex flop.

options.name: -all
options.description: Process all flop instances in design. Default is false.

options.name: -force
options.description: Force to decompose flop regardless timing gains. Default is false.

options.name: -inst
options.description: The names of the flop instance to be decomposed.

options.name: -legal
options.description: To place the decomposed flop and combinational cells at legal location. Default is false.

options.name: -listFile
options.description: The file containing names of flop instances to be decomposed. Specify one instance per line. Comment with #. Instance name can not contain spaces or backslashes.

options.name: -postCTS
options.description: Set -postCTS if design state is postCTS.

options.name: -postRoute
options.description: Set -postRoute if design state is postRoute.

options.name: -power
options.description: Decompose complex flop to reclaim power. Default is false.

options.name: -preCTS
options.description: Set -preCTS if design state is preCTS.

options.name: -skipRoute
options.description: Skip globalDetailRoute after decomposition in postRoute stage.
